title: agrostis vinealis subsp. trinii
intro: Agrostis vinealis subsp. trinii, also known as Trin's bent or Trin's hairgrass, is a subspecies of grass that is native to various parts of the world. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Agrostis vinealis subsp. trinii include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture, or used in combination with other herbs in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
